common_fixes.fix: Set wheelchair_accessible on every trip (most small-agency fleets are 100% accessible, so this is often a single default).
Set wheelchair_boarding to 1 (accessible) or 2 (not accessible) for every stop. A field survey can start with the busiest stops.
Re-export the feed with a calendar that reaches further out, and set feed_info feed_end_date past your next service change.
Add fare_attributes.txt (or Fares v2 files) with your fare structure. If your service is fare-free, ask to have it marked fare-free instead.
Add feed_info.txt with feed_start_date and feed_end_date to your export.
Check the flagged stop times for transposed minutes.
Populate trip_headsign to match what the bus displays.
Enable 'remove unused shapes' (or similar) in your export tool.
